title: GRCH-385 # 4 The story of a virgin who drowns in pleasure with his technique 7 men and women apartment story ~ Indecent daily life of residents ~ - You And Ayumi
description: Kaede, who thought that the world he lived in was different from Daiki, slammed Daiki asking him not to get involved anymore. Shota, who couldn't see Daiki depressed when he heard Kaede's words, finally confessed to Daiki ... Daiki realizes that he really likes Kaede because of his feelings for the first time in his life, and vows to dissolve his relationship with Saffle and see only Kaede. Kaede who was moved by such Daiki ...
